title: Dark HUD / Healtbars & Other
description: Resourcepack that adds dark healthbar, hungerbar, armorbar and other similar interface elements for those who are used to playing with a dark theme
body:
_Resourcepack has not been updated since 2023 as I don't have enough time to do it. For this reason, it may not have retextures of new hearts or other UI elements released after 1.21. Someday I will finalize it... hopefully_

Resourcepack that adds dark healthbar, hungerbar, armorbar and other similar interface elements for those who are used to playing with a dark theme.
Also changes textures of hearts that have effects applied to them (absorption, poisoning, wither, etc.) to darker variations.

**IMPORTANT!**\
This resourcepack does not replace the main interface elements (inventory, hotbar, etc.), so I highly recommend using it together with the Default Dark Mode resourcepack (with it you can also use Darkomizer to match the color).

**Also dont forget that DDM must be above my resourcepack in the resourcepack selection menu to work properly together.**

If you have any bugs, questions or suggestions regarding the resourcepack - contact me in **Discord: Fokz#9135**
